---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or an ADK surface to cover
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case or the ADK feature you want exposed as an MCP tool.

**Proposed tool / behavior**
Which domain it belongs to (`agents`, `tools`, `models`, `sessions`, `memory`,
`artifacts`, `run`, `eval`, `deploy`, `dev`, `a2a`, `mcp_bridge`, `safety`,
`observability`, `project`), the tool name, and its inputs/outputs.

**ADK reference**
Link to the relevant `google-adk` API / docs if known.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workaround you currently use.
